Title: Run index
Preconditions: Enable event-based indexing for catalog entities = OFF
Section: Blue-green index storages (implemented for Elastic Search)
Steps:
Step Description:
Go to the Search module
Choose Product > Build index > Build
Expected Result:
Record count for Active Product index = **N**
Step Description:
1. Make some changes in the Product_1 (ex. update prices)
2. Add Product_2, but don't index it


3. Go to the Search module > Choose Product > Build index > Build
Expected Result:
Process indexation finish successfully
Record count for Active Product index = **N+1**

Step Description:
Go to Catalog > Product_1 > click on the Search Index
Expected Result:
Changes added to the active index
Steps (Expected Result):
1. Record count for Active Product index = **N**
2. Process indexation finish successfully
Record count for Active Product index = **N+1**

3. Changes added to the active index

Choose Product > Build index > Build
2. 1. Make some changes in the Product_1 (ex. update prices)
2. Add Product_2, but don't index it


3. Go to the Search module > Choose Product > Build index > Build
3. Go to Catalog > Product_1 > click on the Search Index

Title: Apply single TermFilter
Expected Result: Only products with Color == 'red' are returned.

Expected Result: Only products with Color == 'red' and Size == 'M' are returned.

Title: Apply OrFilter
Expected Result: Products with Color == 'red' or Color == 'blue' are returned.

Title: Apply AndFilter with nested OrFilter
Expected Result: Products with Size == 'M' and (Color == 'red' or Color == 'Green') are returned.

Expected Result:
Only products where !Brand:Vizio' are returned. Product with brand vizio are not returned

 ![](index.php?/attachments/get/1000005159)
